scope: Full legacy capability-parity migration of internal/connectors/hoorayhr: users, time-off, leave-types, sick-leaves (all 4 legacy streams). Auth is a Tier-2 AuthHook (session-token exchange against /authentication); every stream read remains fully declarative. Legacy is read-only with no reverse-ETL write target; this bundle stays read-only too.

excluded.reason: session-token login exchange, not a syncable object stream; implemented by the hoorayhr AuthHook (hooks/hoorayhr/hooks.go), exercised via check and every data read
